end end return(function(V,B,P,p,X,F,C,W,Y,b,E,c,j,T,y,s,U,a,R,A,o,w,h)o,j,A,W,T,c,Y,E,w,h,a,s,b,U,y,R=function(V,L)local B=w(L)local P=function(...)return c(V,{...},L,B)end return P end,function(V,L)local B=w(L)local P=function(P,p)return c(V,{P;p},L,B)end return P end,function(V,L)local B=w(L)local P=function(P,p,X)return c(V,{P;p,X},L,B)end return P end,{},function(V,L)local B=w(L)local P=function(P,p,X,F)return c(V,{P;p,X;F},L,B)end return P end,function(c,P,p,X)local W,f,x,u,D,sm,z,i,C,q,M,I,e,d,K,w,Um,v,Q,n,Bm,Tm,t,pm,Pm,Lm,Y,Cm,G,l,jm,g,Em,J,o,k,S,Fm,m,U,H,r,wm,N,O,Z,Vm,Wm,Rm,Ym,om,Am,Xm,cm,hm,am while c do if c<7162185-(-337958)then if c<4482432-1029971 then if
